dismissalText.long: c sub (JM Cox) b Suyash Sharma
dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c sub (JM Cox) b Suyash Sharma 56 (22b 4x4 5x6 43m) SR: 254.54

dismissalComment.html: Abhishek's charmed life is finally done. Miscues this attempted loft and skies it to long-off and this time it's a simple catch for Jordan Cox at long-off. Googly, full on leg, and Abhishek can only get it off the toe end as he looks to go down the ground. It would have been b Suyash c Cox in the leggie's last over, and it is b Suyash c Cox now eventually

dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head b Rasikh Salam 26 (16b 5x4 0x6 18m) SR: 162.5

dismissalComment.html: Out goes the off stump! Rasikh has his hand on his ear in celebration as he knocks head over. He's been going for the yorkers and this time he nails it at 134kph. Head again looks to back away and drive it out on the off side but is late on the shot and his fun is over for the day

dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c Padikkal b Rasikh Salam 79 (46b 8x4 3x6 92m) SR: 171.73

dismissalComment.html: Taken comfortably by Padikkal at long-off and SRH end on 255 for 4. Low full toss bowled well outside off again, away from Kishan's hitting arc. He goes for it, gets it right of the bottom of the bat and DDP does the rest

dismissalText.commentary: Heinrich Klaasen c Iyer b Pandya 51 (24b 2x4 5x6 49m) SR: 212.5

dismissalComment.html: Mistimed straight to deep midwicket and Krunal has struck a very timely blow. The low-arm slinger does the trick for Krunal. Outside off stump, Klaasen wanted to deposit that over the ropes again, but doesn't get under it and only miscues as far as Venkatesh Iyer who runs in and takes a comfortable catch

dismissalText.long: c sub (JM Cox) b Suyash Sharma
dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c sub (JM Cox) b Suyash Sharma 56 (22b 4x4 5x6 43m) SR: 254.54

dismissalComment.html: Abhishek's charmed life is finally done. Miscues this attempted loft and skies it to long-off and this time it's a simple catch for Jordan Cox at long-off. Googly, full on leg, and Abhishek can only get it off the toe end as he looks to go down the ground. It would have been b Suyash c Cox in the leggie's last over, and it is b Suyash c Cox now eventually
